perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is live-action. A male creator wearing a grey 'Roots' hoodie, glasses, and a flat cap holds a smartphone showing a Ghibli-style illustration. (2) A screen recording shows a chat interface (ChatGPT) converting a photo into a cartoon style. (3) The creator returns to the screen, gesturing with his hands while speaking excitedly. (4) A digital news article is displayed as an overlay, discussing Ghibli Studio's response to the AI trend. (5) The creator ends the video looking directly at the camera with a questioning expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, mid-tempo lo-fi electronic music begins. A male voice speaks in Mandarin with a clear, energetic, and professional tone. (2) The music continues as a background layer while the host describes the viral AI image trend and the rumors of a legal warning. (3) Brief 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects (SFX) occur when text and images appear on the screen. (4) The host's voice concludes the narrative with a slightly inquisitive inflection as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '吉卜力風格圖片' (Ghibli style picture) - Bold yellow text used as a hook. (2) Functional Text: '侵害著作權' (Copyright infringement) - Red text highlighting the central conflict. (3) Functional Text: Continuous subtitles in Traditional Chinese tracking the spoken dialogue. (4) Decorative Text: '然而吉卜力工作室' (However, Ghibli Studio) - Transitioning the narrative to the official response.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a sequence: Intro hook -> Explanation of trend -> Discussion of controversy -> Debunking rumors -> Outro question.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, a flat cap, and a grey 'Roots' brand hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A neutral, out-of-focus indoor studio or home office setting with soft vertical blinds or panels.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Explanation -> Conflict -> Resolution -> Question
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a tech-focused commentary piece designed to inform the audience about a viral AI image trend (Ghibli style) and address rumors concerning copyright warnings from Studio Ghibli. It uses a rumor-and-fact-check structure to maintain engagement and provide clarity on a trending topic.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator uses a consistent studio setup with social media handle overlays and a specific 'miko' logo.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages high-contrast text overlays to highlight keywords, which is a common visual strategy in short-form Chinese-language commentary vlogs.
